message:
🌱 Add containerd: Set `[plugins."io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri".registry].config_p mission (#1543)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-6485-set-plugins-io-containerd-grpc-v1-cri-registry-config-path-by-de",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: Set `[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".registry].config_path` by default",
+    "description": "Set `[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".registry].config_path` by default. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current containerd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your containerd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nhelm list -n containerd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working containerd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd\n```\n### What is the problem you're trying to solve\n\nI'm trying to add a new private registry (with a self-signed CA) to an existing Kubernetes cluster, where I may not have ssh access (but I do have `cluster-admin`)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Set `[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".registry].config_p…",
+        "description": "This is not defaulted because it is a new option which is replacing older options.\nWe could see if the older options are set and set a default if they are not, maybe?\nAlternatively, depending on your situation, ask your k8s provider to set a default value for new nodes.\n```yaml\necho \"${PEM_ENCODED_CERT}\" > /etc/docker/certs.d/${REGISTRY_NAME}/ca.crt\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Set `[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".registry].config_p…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is not defaulted because it is a new option which is replacing older options.\nWe could see if the older options are set and set a default if they are not, maybe?\nAlternatively, depending on your situation, ask your k8s provider to set a default value for new nodes.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "echo \"${PEM_ENCODED_CERT}\" > /etc/docker/certs.d/${REGISTRY_NAME}/ca.crt",
+        "[plugins.\"io.containerd.grpc.v1.cri\".registry]\n   config_path = \"/etc/containerd/certs.d\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
